data.body:
TARGETS — VERIFICATION CORRECTIONS (Explore audit). MATERIAL routing fixes:
* There is NO ticket-lifecycle.sh and NO ticket-delete.sh. Correct routing:
  - create -> ticket_create() in ticket-lib-api.sh (canonical in-process path; standalone ticket-create.sh also emits the "Created ...\n<id>" lines — both paths print, handle both).
  - claim  -> ticket-claim.sh (direct exec; CLAIMED: line at ~:79; exit 10 at ~:72).
  - transition -> ticket_transition() in ticket-lib-api.sh (wraps ticket-transition.sh; UNBLOCKED: line; exit 10 at ticket-transition.sh:397).
  - reopen -> ticket_transition() hardcoded closed->open (same path as transition).
  - delete -> ticket_delete() in ticket-lib-api.sh:2041 (Deleted...\nUNBLOCKED: ; --user-approved guard, no exit 10).
* All proposed JSON shapes are FEASIBLE from data each command already has.
* SCOPE CLARIFICATION: delete has NO library wrapper and NO MCP tool today, and is intentionally NOT in the MCP write-tool set (see CLAUDE.md). => delete --output json is CLI/ENGINE-ONLY; do NOT add delete to lib/MCP in this story.
* claim()/transition() in __init__.py SYNTHESIZE their result dicts client-side (hardcoded). After engine gains --output json, reconcile so the library PARSES engine JSON (single source) rather than re-deriving — keeps shapes from drifting.
